arts.ttl: Forest score FOUR to move one point behind Arsenal
arts.sum: In Nuno Espirito Santo's 50th Premier League match in charge of Forest, Nikola Milenkovic got the first of three goals in six minutes before half-time with a fierce finish from inside the box. Anthony Elanga scored twice as Nottingham Forest earned a 4-2 home win over Ipswich Town to strengthen their hold on third place, moving one point behind second-placed Arsenal .

arts.ttl: 'The moment I watched them': Mikel Arteta shares what he privately thought about Chelsea in pre-season last year
William Gallas shares what Chelsea did under Jose Mourinho that 'scared' their opponents
arts.sum: Former Chelsea star William Gallas has recalled a brilliant story from his playing career at Stamford Bridge under Jose Mourinho. Retired French defender William Gallas,...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Atletico replay claim made amid penalty drama and Arsenal wait
arts.sum: The Argentine slipped as he struck the ball and it just about flew under the bar, but the referee disallowed the penalty for a double touch after an intervention from VAR. Despite multiple angles of the penalty, it is not wholly clear that Alvarez actually touched the ball with his standing foot first.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres fires cryptic transfer message after double Mikel Arteta decision made
arts.sum: As the caption of a post that showed him celebrating and placing two fingers on his pulse, he cryptically wrote: "One more time [handshake emoji]." That message arrived following his two goals against Casa Pia which proved decisive in the result. Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres has, seemingly, returned to form at the perfect time - with a cryptic message subsequently sent.

arts.ttl: Chelsea receive huge Champions League boost amid Premier League additional slot truth
arts.sum: Although Liverpool were defeated by Paris Saint-Germain on penalties on Tuesday, Arsenal and Aston Villa's progression into the last eight, as well as Manchester United, Tottenham and Chelsea's qualification to the latter stages of UEFA's secondary competitions, has all but secured that fifth spot. Chelsea have been handed a significant boost in their hopes of qualifying for next season's UEFA Champions League, despite having not yet kicked a ball in the Premier League this weekend.

arts.ttl: Report: The position Chelsea are 'more likely' to play Geovany Quenda in when he joins in 2026
arts.sum: Even though Geovany Quenda won’t become a Chelsea player until 2026, Blues supporters may already be thinking about how he can fit into the plans...

arts.ttl: RVN decision against Chelsea shows Leicester trio could be moved on
arts.sum: Jannik Vestergaard, Odsonne Edouard, and Oliver Skipp have reportedly fallen out of favour with the Leicester City manager Ruud Van Nistelrooy. According to Foxes of Leicester, the three players were recently dropped against Chelsea despite not being injured and that has sent out a strong statement regarding their futures at the club. The report states […] The post RVN decision against Chelsea shows Leicester trio could be moved on appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle star Bruno Guimaraes transfer 'agreement' as £60m Arsenal stance emerges
arts.sum: The Brazilian international has been a staple of Eddie Howe's midfield since joining from Lyon for £40 million in 2022, but now Arsenal's new sporting director Andre Berta is looking to steady his by bringing Guimaraes to The Emirates . As Berta attempts to gut the Newcastle side, reports have come in from Spanish outlet AS that the Magpies have agreed a deal that could see the Brazilian leave St James' for £60 million if they fail to qualify for the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as four miss Chelsea with perfect Bukayo Saka return scenario clear
arts.sum: The Gunners sealed their place in the Champions League quarter-finals earlier this week having beaten PSV 9-3 on aggregate. Some involvement in those fixtures could see Saka back in the starting XI for the first leg at Emirates Stadium or potentially the following week in Madrid.
